core_mechanism: Multiplicative decomposition of a deformation-parameter-dependent algebraic invariant into a product of two invariants by quotienting out an internal symmetry, isolating a reduced 'projective' factor
brief_reason: The method hinges on 'using the symmetry principle ... to decompose the quantum invariant as the product of two invariants,' isolating a projective factor whose arithmetic (integrality when the deformation parameter is a prime root of unity) and small-parameter asymptotics (an Ohtsuki-style perturbative power-series expansion) are then the paper's further results.
